name: ChkStart_LINSynchBreakTimingViolation
title: ChkStart_LINSynchBreakTimingViolation
description: Checks the timing of the synchronization break field in LIN headers.
An event will be generated, if the measured length [in bit times] of break low phase is outside of the specified range.

parameters.description: Minimum length of break low phase shall not be checked
Minimum allowed length of break low phase
